_README: Authoritative, immutable appearance constraints per character. The portrait generator (engine _auto_portrait, world_art reconciler, fix_portraits) MUST inject the 'lock' verbatim and treat it as non-negotiable canon. 'scene' overrides the default dramatic-headshot framing when a character needs a different shot. Operator-reviewed identity markers live here — never let a model drift off them.

bruce_banner.lock: a weary neurotic white man in his late 30s, messy dark curly brown hair, round thin glasses, unkempt salt-and-pepper stubble, anxious tired brown eyes, lean academic build, plain purple t-shirt — disheveled brilliant physicist

matt_murdock.lock: a sharp-jawed Irish-American man in his early 30s, AUBURN / dark reddish-brown hair (NOT brown, NOT black), clean-shaven. He wears small round glasses with SOLID OPAQUE BRIGHT-RED lenses that COMPLETELY HIDE HIS EYES — you can NEVER see his eyes, no eyes visible at all, the round lenses are fully opaque glowing red discs (as iconic and eye-concealing as Cyclops's visor), thin metal round frames. Sharp tailored suit, confident blind lawyer bearing

lucky_the_pizza_dog.scene: candid photograph of the dog, warm natural light, urban Brooklyn rooftop background, shallow depth of field, photoreal animal portrait, no text, no watermark

wanda_maximoff.lock: Wanda Maximoff, the SCARLET WITCH — an AFRO-LATINA young woman in her 20s, leaning predominantly LATINA (mixed heritage but more Latina than Black), warm sun-kissed light-to-medium brown skin, striking beautiful Latina features, long flowing dark hair in SOFT LOOSE WAVES with auburn/mahogany tones (gently wavy, NOT a tight afro, NOT heavily coiled). CLASSIC COMIC costume: a form-fitting CRIMSON-RED swimsuit-cut leotard bodysuit with a plunging neckline (cleavage), long red gloves and thigh-high red boots, a flowing red cape, and her ICONIC tall red/pink head-CROWN headpiece (the Scarlet Witch wimple-crown framing her face with two points). Faint red chaos-magic energy glowing at her hands. Twin sister of Pietro, daughter of Magneto
